svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content: <mxfile host="Electron" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) draw.io/29.6.1 Chrome/142.0.7444.265 Electron/39.8.0 Safari/537.36" version="29.6.1"> <diagram id="border-overlap" name="Border Overlap"> <mxGraphModel dx="-384" dy="-216" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="0" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="900" pageHeight="600" background="none" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="box" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=18;fontFamily=Noto Sans JP;fontColor=#1e3a8a;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;spacing=8;" value="Border Overlap Fixture" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="120" width="280" x="220" y="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge" edge="1" parent="1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;endArrow=block;endFill=1;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#dc2626;" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="140" y="180" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="580" y="180" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(37, 99, 235), rgb(105, 158, 255));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 266px; height: 1px; padding-top: 78px; margin-left: 105px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #1e3a8a;
display: inline-block; font-size: 18px; font-family: 'Noto Sans JP'; color: light-dark(#1e3a8a, #a3bbff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(220, 38, 38), rgb(255, 138, 138)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(220, 38, 38), rgb(255, 138, 138));
